input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.3.3
            TITLE: the perimeter shear strength of the monocoque laminate in the front bulkhead support

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.3.3: The perimeter shear strength of the monocoque laminate in the Front Bulkhead support
F.7.3.3 The perimeter shear strength of the monocoque laminate in the Front Bulkhead support 
structure must be 4 kN or more for a section with a diameter of 25 mm.    
This must be proven by a physical test completed per F.4.3.5 and the results included in the 
SES.

final_answer: rule F.7.3.3: The perimeter shear strength of the monocoque laminate in the Front Bulkhead support structure must be 4 kN or more for a section with a diameter of 25 mm. This must be proven by a physical test completed per F.4.3.5 and the results included in the SES.
